title: matelea maritima subsp. micrantha
intro: Matelea maritima subsp. micrantha is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as the Antilles swallow-wort. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Matelea maritima subsp. micrantha include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat wounds, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine in some regions.
